violations.text: Facility is lacking signage for designated handsink. A sign or poster must be notifying food employees of handwashing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (A-1 and B-1 ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
One sink was observed not working and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The bottom of cabinets in kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The (wall behind door ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Facility is lacking signage for a designated hand sink. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The door (A-4) to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Milk chest #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The one bay sink was observed not working and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The bottom cabinets in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
Facility is lacking signage for a designated hand sink. A sign or poster must ne posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The floors under 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
Cheese quesadilla was received at 120DF. Food was placed in hot hold unit until it reached proper temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The (wall ) in the (ware washing area ) area is in poor repair. Observed detached coving and peeled paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Macaroni and cheese was observed held at (109-123) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food product temperatures were reached during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Rodent droppings observed in storage cabinet. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
